text: by the way, you have to remember when we used to write 1, 6, it used to have 1, 2, 5 so if I print and write i here then what will happen, the value of i will come from 1 to 5 and what does this range function do? see 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, it printed exactly the same thing now come back to the PDF sometimes we want to repeat a set of statements in our program like we have to print numbers from 1 to 1000 loops make it easy for the programmer to do this work we have two types of loops one is a while loop and the other is a for loop the loop I showed you was a for loop we will talk about it in detail but I just wanted to give you an introduction to it so let's start without wasting time with while loops so while loops.py .py is an extension, a python file now we will come back to our PDF what is a while loop? while loop and for loop are two different types of loops we talked about this so are they different? which one is better? both are different ways of doing the same thing which one to use when? I will teach you all in this chapter so first learn the while loop suppose I have a variable i its value is 1 listen carefully I will write while and I will write condition suppose I write i is less than 6 I will enter a colon see it is indented it means I have entered the while loop and now if I write print i then what will happen? i's value is 1 condition will check so while loop is executed when condition is true what is the condition in this case? 1 is less than 6 is true so it will come in the while loop it will print i which has value 1 and after this I will write i plus equals to 1 which means what should I do to i's value? I should make i's value 2 so i's value was 1 so I will write control which means our program is running check 1 less than 6 was true it will print 1 will be printed in console it will be 2 i's value is 2 while because it is a loop so it will check the condition listen carefully once it is executed with 1 value then it will have value 2 it will come back then it will run then it will come back then it will run then it will come back and then it will run and it will run and it will run till condition is true if condition is always true then it will become an infinite while loop which we don't need in ideal scenario but you can see what will be the output of this program I will do one thing I will write here I am just telling you what will be the output to make you understand I will use triple single quote and toggle the screen cast mode so that when I do such operations you don't ask me how I am doing you can see which key is pressing now you can see when i's value was 1 then this condition was true print i means 1 i's value is 2 2 less than 6 is true so 2 will be printed so this will be printed then i's value will be 3 will 3 less than 6? yes, print i will be print 3 should be removed then it will be 4 then condition is true is 4 less than 6? yes, 4 value will be printed now it is 5 is 5 less than 6? now it is 5 now it is 6 6 less than 6? it doesn't happen, that's why on 6 less than 6 this loop will not execute this loop will exit, means it will come out of the control loop and this loop's execution will end and our output will come 1,2,3,4,5 so the work I did with for loop, the same work is done with while loop so what will while loop do, it will check the condition once, it will execute all the masala inside it will check the condition again, if it is true then it will check again again everything will be executed, it will check the condition again and so on till the condition is false one thing important in while loop is that you have to make the condition false here otherwise your while loop will never exit, means whatever you are checking in the condition somehow you have to alter it in the while loop, like in this case we changed the value of i and eventually our i value became less than 6, means greater than equal to 6, less than 6 became false basically I will say that our condition became false eventually eventually our while condition became false, because of which our while loop exited I hope that is clear now, I hope you understood, now come back to the notes I have written it for you with a lot of love, this block will
